title: TuringEra Unveils Next-Gen Edge AI SoC Solution, Accelerating Global Edge Intelligence Deployment
description: Silicon Valley, California–(Newsfile Corp. – March 7, 2026) – TuringEra, a global leading provider in edge AI solutions, officially launched its next-generation Edge AI SoC Solution in Silicon Valley today,designed to streamline the development and deployment of intelligent robotics, smart home appliances, and industrial automation systems. title: Pentagon taps former DOGE official to lead its AI efforts
description: The Pentagon on Friday named Gavin Kliger as their chief data officer, a computer ​scientist who aided Elon Musk's efforts to overhaul the government and boosted white supremacists and misogynists online.

title: CDW CFO: 2026 Focus on Growth, Cash Flow and Buybacks as AI, PCs Drive Cautious Spend
description: CDW (NASDAQ:CDW) Chief Financial Officer Al Miralles told investors at the Morgan Stanley TMT conference that the company is focused on “controlling what we can control” as it plans for 2026, after what he described as a difficult 2023 and 2024 marked by macro pressure, elongated customer decision cycles, and uneven public-sector funding dynamics. Miralles [...]

title: Sarawak’s AI journey: From ambition to execution
description: This is a first part of a two-piece feature. KUCHING (March 8): Sarawak’s ambition to become a regional artificial intelligence (AI) hub by 2027 is fast shifting from policy intent towards concrete implementation. What began as a bold vision in October 2024 has in just one year evolved into early-stage prototypes, cross border collaboration, semiconductor [...]The post Sarawak’s AI journey: From ambition to execution appeared first on Borneo Post Online.

title: Openai Robotics Chief Resigns Over Pentagon AI Deal
description: (MENAFN - IANS) New Delhi, March 8 (IANS) The head of OpenAI's robotics team, Caitlin Kalinowski, has announced resignation, citing the company's move to deploy its artificial intelligence (AI) ...
